title: Freshness/refresh job: hash drift + staleness flagging
context: Registry text changes frequently, so a freshness job re-pulls sources, compares stored source-text hashes, and flags drift and stale claims. Recruiting status is never asserted as guidance; current status is always deferred to the live registry link. Staleness is flagged automatically within the 30-day SLA.
objective: Build a freshness/refresh job that re-pulls sources, compares sourceTextSha256 to detect drift, and flags stale records within the refresh SLA without ever asserting recruiting status.
acceptanceCriteria: Refresh re-pulls sources and compares sourceTextSha256 to detect drift.
Drift and stale 'recruiting' claims are flagged automatically within the 30-day SLA.
Current status is deferred to the live registry link and never asserted as guidance.
No secrets written to logs; job runs reproducibly.
